prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for a tactics RPG battlefield set in a faction home base
Primary request: create the Time Travelers home-base backdrop, the Aion Relay Vault
Scene/background: a buried chrono-relay command vault with stepped steel gantries, reactor pylons, sealed bulkhead arches, frost-rimed catwalks, cable trenches, and a distant aperture showing ruined sky
Subject: the relay vault floor and central reactor dais must read instantly as a desperate science-fantasy redoubt rather than a shiny sci-fi lab
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a solemn tactics RPG, matching existing Renations battle backdrops instead of glossy concept art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot designed to crop well to 16:9, strong foreground floor shapes, readable midground reactor platform, no characters
Lighting/mood: cold bunker gloom with restrained teal relay glow and sparse emergency amber lamps, martial and tragic rather than flashy
Color palette: weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, reactor white, soot gray, muted brass accents
Materials/textures: worn steel plates, cracked reactor housings, cable conduits, frosted rails, soot-stained concrete
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no neon spectacle, no glossy 3D, no oversized empty padding, keep the scene readable behind interface panels
Avoid: photorealism, sleek spaceship bridge design, oversaturated cyan, anime sci-fi glamour, tiny noisy greebles everywhere

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for a tactics RPG battlefield set in a faction home base
Primary request: create the Myrmidons home-base backdrop, the Brine Cathedral
Scene/background: an under-ice war sanctuary of black sea-stone, shell buttresses, flooded channels, barnacled pillars, hanging nets, ritual tide basins, and broken ice light filtering from above
Subject: the brine cathedral floor and tidal war altar must dominate the read, giving the battlefield a heavy amphibious sacred character
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a solemn science-fantasy tactics RPG, grounded and moody rather than cinematic splash art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot for 16:9 cropping, strong foreground tide platform, layered arches and pools, no characters
Lighting/mood: dim under-ice atmosphere with ghostly teal reflections and low ember ritual braziers, solemn, martial, and ancient
Color palette: kelp black, sea green, brine cyan, rust leather, wet stone gray, pale ice light
Materials/textures: slick shell-like stone, wet worn masonry, algae stains, heavy rope nets, shallow water reflections
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no tropical fantasy look, no oversized sea monsters, no clutter that hides the board identity; keep the environment readable when cropped
Avoid: photorealism, bright coral colors, cartoon pirates, glossy underwater spectacle, busy micro-detail noise

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for a tactics RPG battlefield set in a faction home base
Primary request: create The Order home-base backdrop, the Iron Basilica
Scene/background: a bunker-basilica parade court inside an Antarctic fortress, with iron nave arches, brass reliquaries, command banners, heavy blast doors, snow haze at a distant gate, and processional stonework
Subject: the parade court and imperial sanctuary approach must read as a disciplined military stronghold with ecclesiastical weight
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a late-90s and early-2000s style tactics RPG, matching the repo's solemn war chapel tone
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot with strong foreground flagstones leading to a raised basilica threshold, designed for 16:9 crop, no characters
Lighting/mood: cold fortress light cut by warm torch and lamp glow, formal, severe, and mournful
Color palette: iron black, aged brass, dark wine, parchment ivory, worn stone gray, polar blue haze used sparingly
Materials/textures: brushed steel, weathered masonry, waxed banners, riveted doors, frost dust, brass fittings
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no sci-fi control room clutter, no glossy marble palace styling, preserve grounded tactical readability
Avoid: photorealism, bright heroic propaganda art, neon highlights, cartoon exaggeration, tiny over-detailed ornament everywhere

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: map-specific background art for a tactics RPG battlefield set in a faction home base
Primary request: create the Children of Prophecy home-base backdrop, the Cloister of Aevum
Scene/background: a hidden prophecy cloister with terraced meditation courts, carved bone-stone colonnades, ember braziers, prayer banners, memory obelisks, and a distant canyon dawn seen through high arches
Subject: the cloister terraces and ritual central dais must read as an ascetic psychic sanctuary built for contemplation and defense
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D environment matte for a solemn tactics RPG, closer to grounded sacred ruins than flashy fantasy temple art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot for 16:9 crop, strong foreground terrace shapes, layered arches and central ritual platform, no characters
Lighting/mood: dawn-lit hush with warm ember fire against pale stone and muted desert haze, solemn and slightly tragic
Color palette: bone white, sun-faded sand, ember red, dusty umber, pale gold, ash-violet in the far distance only if needed
Materials/textures: carved stone, wrapped cloth banners, weathered stucco, bronze braziers, dusty steps, faint incense haze
Quality: high
Constraints: no characters, no text, no UI, no oversized mystical energy beam, no lush tropical oasis cues, keep the composition readable behind menu overlays
Avoid: photorealism, bright high-fantasy temple glamor, neon magic circles, anime scenic illustration, micro-detail clutter

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: runtime terrain tile sprite for a tactics RPG
Primary request: create a Time Travelers home-base terrain tile variant A
Scene/background: transparent background only
Subject: one clean isometric diamond floor tile made of weathered steel plates with inset relay seams, riveted panel joins, and a faint oxidized teal conduit line
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired isometric tile sprite for a late-90s and early-2000s tactics RPG, grounded science-fantasy, crisp large shapes, restrained texture
Composition/framing: single centered tile diamond, top surface only, tight crop, no props, no floor shadow beyond the tile art itself
Lighting/mood: subdued bunker light with restrained cool reflections and slight warm edge wear, serious and utilitarian
Color palette: weathered steel, soot gray, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange used very sparingly, reactor white scuffs
Materials/textures: dented steel plating, sealed seams, worn anti-slip texture, grime in grooves
Quality: high
Constraints: this must read clearly when rendered as a 96 by 96 terrain sprite on a 96 by 48 isometric battlefield tile; keep the silhouette grounded and the detail broad; the art must read as the tile surface itself, not a separate object; transparent background
Avoid: photorealism, glossy 3D, neon glow, floating machinery, text, decals with letters, busy micro-detail, oversized empty padding
